name: HWR_WLNS_COACHING_TOPICS_VL
query: SELECT B.COACHING_TOPIC_ID, B.IS_ACTIVE, B.COACHING_TOPICS_ATTR_1, B.COACHING_TOPICS_ATTR_2, B.COACHING_TOPICS_ATTR_3, T.COACHING_TOPIC_NAME, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM HWR_WLNS_COACHING_TOPICS_B B, HWR_WLNS_COACHING_TOPICS_TL T WHERE B.COACHING_TOPIC_ID = T.COACHING_TOPIC_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
